fundamentals.name: Astera Labs, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Astera Labs, Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells semiconductor-based connectivity solutions for cloud and AI infrastructure. It offers an intelligent connectivity platform, comprised of semiconductor-based, high-speed, mixed-signal connectivity products that integrate a matrix of microcontrollers and sensors, and COSMOS. The company provides COSMOS software suite, a connectivity system management and optimization software that enables management and optimization of resources for large fleets at cloud-scale via link, fleet, and RAS management capabilities. In addition, it offers PCIe/CXL smart DSP retimers and cable modules; ethernet smart cable modules for cloud and AI infrastructure; CXL memory connectivity controllers; and smart fabric switches. The company serves hyperscalers and system original equipment manufacturers. Astera Labs, Inc. was incorporated in 2017 and is based in San Jose, California.

judgment.summary: Rapidly growing company with exceptional revenue and earnings expansion, strong margins, and a healthy balance sheet, albeit with a high valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 13.5%; next earnings date is 2026-08-04.
positives: Revenue growth 93.4% YoY — exceptional top-line expansion.
Quarterly earnings growth 152.4% — significant bottom-line acceleration.
Gross margin 76.0% and Profit margin 26.7% — industry-leading profitability.
Return on equity 21.1% — efficient use of shareholder capital.
Current ratio 11.30 — very strong short-term liquidity.
negatives: Trailing P/E 241.15 and Forward P/E 83.70 — valuation is extremely high.
Price/Sales (TTM) 60.26 — market is pricing in substantial future growth.
Debt/Equity 2.80 — leverage is notable, though offset by strong liquidity.
Analyst mean target $244.97 is below current price — suggests limited upside from current levels according to analysts.

news.paragraph: Astera Labs has seen significant positive momentum, with its stock climbing over 30% in recent days following strong analyst ratings and a record high. The company recently beat its Q1 earnings estimates, and analysts project robust growth for the current quarter and fiscal year. This surge in price action, coupled with a 'golden cross' technical signal, has fueled bullish sentiment.
